title: Database Connection Pool Exhaustion
symptoms: Application logs show 'FATAL: sorry, too many clients already'
API requests timeout while waiting for a DB connection
root_cause_analysis: The application is leaking connections or an unexpected spike in traffic has consumed all available connections in the PostgreSQL connection pool (pgbouncer or native).
resolution_steps: 1. Identify the service holding the most active connections using pg_stat_activity.
2. Restart the offending service pods to forcefully drop idle/leaked connections.
3. Check for recently deployed inefficient queries or missing indexes causing long-running transactions.
4. If this is a legitimate traffic spike, temporarily increase max_connections (if safe) or scale up the connection pooler.
